name: Tartakovsky
description: Genndy Tartakovsky / Samurai Jack — hand-drawn cel, thick outlines, flat fills
use_for: narrative storytelling, character-driven content, mythic/timeless feel

accent.role: ON-AIR signs, mic windscreens, focal-point rim lights

flux.positive_prefix: Hand-drawn 2D animation cel in the style of Samurai Jack by Genndy Tartakovsky: thick black ink outlines, flat color fills with NO gradients, minimal cel-shaded shadows (max two shadow tones), geometric simplicity, hand-painted backgrounds.
flux.positive_suffix: Flat color fills only, no smooth gradients, no photorealism, no 3D rendering.

always_add: ANATOMICALLY PROPORTIONAL — not chibi, not oversized heads, not cute-cartoon
subjects facing each other with eye contact when conversing
named real-world products specified by silhouette / model (e.g. 'RODE PodMic')
lighting suggested via flat highlight SHAPES only, no gradients
